title: Company in the News: Zhongji Innolight - The Wire China
gist: Zhongji Innolight, the world's leading optical-module maker and a key supplier to Google, Nvidia, Huawei and Alibaba, derives 90% of revenue from outside China but was just listed by the U.S. Defense Department as a Chinese military company, threatening its access to U.S. defense supply chains.

themes.theme: Market position in the data-center boom

insights.claim: Zhongji Innolight is the world's leading producer of optical modules—hardware linking servers and routers—and supplies tech giants including Google, Nvidia, Huawei and Alibaba.
insights.speaker: Ella Apostoaie
insights.so_what: A single dominant Chinese supplier sits at a chokepoint of the AI data-center buildout, so any restriction on it ripples through hyperscaler hardware roadmaps.
insights.quote: Zhongji Innolight, the world’s leading producer of optical modules, is riding high on the global data center boom.

insights.claim: 90 percent of Zhongji Innolight's 2025 revenue came from sales outside of China, per its most recent annual report.
insights.speaker: Ella Apostoaie
insights.so_what: Heavy reliance on export revenue makes the company acutely exposed to U.S. and allied trade or security actions.
insights.quote: 90 percent of Zhongji Innolight’s 2025 revenue was from sales outside of China, according to its most recent annual report.

insights.claim: In June the U.S. Defense Department listed Zhongji Innolight as a Chinese military company operating in the United States, meaning U.S. firms could be barred from using its components in any military-used products unless it is removed.
insights.speaker: Ella Apostoaie
insights.so_what: The designation introduces concrete supply-chain exclusion risk for a critical optical-module supplier; watch for downstream sourcing shifts and the company's removal efforts.
insights.quote: the U.S. Defense Department listed Zhongji Innolight as a Chinese military company operating in the United States.
insights.locator: But its role in the global tech ecosystem
